query: SELECT t.id, t.transactionNumber, t.commissionRate, t.commissionType, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN contacts c ON t.primaryContactId = c.id WHERE c.lastName = 'Wilson' OR c.firstName = 'Jack' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2stQR1ySY2c4Vud.1719b3382959 --database RGtcxHR8RPxZsqyxZLCcuq --execute SELECT t.id, t.transactionNumber, t.commissionRate, t.commissionType, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN contacts c ON t.primaryContactId = c.id WHERE c.lastName = 'Wilson' OR c.firstName = 'Jack' LIMIT 5;
